pages.text: $(thing)Missing or conflicted Core:$() check that every required block touches by a full face and that the route is loaded. A network must have exactly one Core. Remove an extra Core to clear a conflicted network.

$(thing)Lost packed Core:$() run $(thing)/magic_storage recover_core$() before placing another token. It reissues your latest owned, unclaimed server snapshot. Already-claimed tokens and data lost before the recovery update cannot be restored.
$(thing)Full type capacity:$() existing types can remain in the Core, but a brand-new type cannot enter. Add or upgrade Storage Units, or remove an unneeded variant, then try the item again.

$(thing)Unsupported recipe:$() install the matching station first. If the preview remains neutral, the recipe may be special, dynamic, incomplete, a Smithing Trim, brewing, or another unsupported form. Choose a normal supported recipe instead.

$(thing)Output has no room:$() a $(thing)whole craft$() must fit with every container remainder. Clear player or Core space, or switch Craft Output, then retry. A failed capacity check consumes no ingredients, energy, or Axe Energy.

$(thing)Fuel, remote, or casing issue:$() verify the selected Fuel Target and the item's valid burn value; keep the bound Core and route loaded in the same dimension; and install optional Fusion 1.2.12 only if you want connected casing.
